name: ctyun-ddoscloud
description: OctoBus package for CTYun DDoS High Protection Edge Cloud read-only query APIs.

CTYun_DDoSCloud.CTYun_DDoSCloud/DomainQu.name: domain-query
CTYun_DDoSCloud.CTYun_DDoSCloud/DomainQu.description: Query CTYun DDoS Cloud domain basic information.

CTYun_DDoSCloud.CTYun_DDoSCloud/TopDomai.name: top-domain
CTYun_DDoSCloud.CTYun_DDoSCloud/TopDomai.description: Query CTYun DDoS Cloud subscribed service information.

CTYun_DDoSCloud.CTYun_DDoSCloud/GetDdosA.name: get-ddos-attack-trend
CTYun_DDoSCloud.CTYun_DDoSCloud/GetDdosA.description: Query CTYun DDoS Cloud DDoS attack trends.

CTYun_DDoSCloud.CTYun_DDoSCloud/GetDdosA.name: get-ddos-attack-event
CTYun_DDoSCloud.CTYun_DDoSCloud/GetDdosA.description: Query CTYun DDoS Cloud DDoS attack events.

CTYun_DDoSCloud.CTYun_DDoSCloud/GetCcAtt.name: get-cc-attack-event
CTYun_DDoSCloud.CTYun_DDoSCloud/GetCcAtt.description: Query CTYun DDoS Cloud CC attack events.

CTYun_DDoSCloud.CTYun_DDoSCloud/GetPortL.name: get-port-list
CTYun_DDoSCloud.CTYun_DDoSCloud/GetPortL.description: Query CTYun DDoS Cloud protected port list.

CTYun_DDoSCloud.CTYun_DDoSCloud/CertList.name: cert-list
CTYun_DDoSCloud.CTYun_DDoSCloud/CertList.description: Query CTYun DDoS Cloud certificate list.

CTYun_DDoSCloud.CTYun_DDoSCloud/InvokeRe.name: invoke-read-only-api
CTYun_DDoSCloud.CTYun_DDoSCloud/InvokeRe.description: Invoke a built-in CTYun DDoS Cloud read-only API.
